summary: Completed full onboarding flow testing for Fixi App V1.3. All 8 flows passed. 2 regressions passed. 1 minor UX bug found in Step6 canSubmit logic.

ui_bugs.issue: canSubmit only checks name+total but NOT monthly. Button becomes enabled (green) when name+total filled, but handleSubmit also validates monthly and shows error 'Bitte gib eine monatliche Rate ein'. UX inconsistency: button appears clickable but fails validation.
ui_bugs.fix: In step6.tsx, update: const canSubmit = name.trim().length > 0 && total.length > 0 && monthly.length > 0;

action_items: Fix step6.tsx: update canSubmit to also require monthly: const canSubmit = name.trim().length > 0 && total.length > 0 && monthly.length > 0;
critical_code_review_comments: step6.tsx line 36: canSubmit missing monthly.length > 0 check. User sees green CTA but gets error on click when monthly is empty.

flow_results.FLOW1_Welcome: PASS - Fox visible, typing bubble 'Endlich einen Plan. Endlich frei. 🦊' appears, stat text '5,67 Mio.' visible, CTA navigates to /onboarding-name
flow_results.FLOW2_Name: PASS - Input found (data-testid), speech bubble appears on typing, text changes to 'Schön dich kennenzulernen, [Name]! 🦊' at >=2 chars, button disabled <2 chars, navigates to /onboarding/step3
flow_results.FLOW3_Age: PASS - Fox speech bubble visible, all 6 age cards (18-24, 25-34, 35-44, 45-54, 55-64, 65+) found via data-testid, 2x3 grid renders, tapping card navigates to /onboarding/step4
flow_results.FLOW4_Emotions: PASS - 3 categories visible, all 12 emotions found, multi-select works, button shows 'Weiter (N)' count, disabled at 0, navigates to /onboarding/step5
flow_results.FLOW5_TripleYes: PASS - 3 cards with accent stripes visible, social proof text visible, CTA navigates to /onboarding/step6
flow_results.FLOW6_Debt: PASS (with minor bug) - All 4 fields found, hint card visible, submission with all fields navigates to /onboarding/step7. BUG: CTA enabled without monthly filled
flow_results.FLOW7_DateReveal: PASS - Confetti runs, fox celebrates, date card with spring animation visible, stats card (Monate + Zinsen), quote visible, CTA navigates to /face-id (→ /paywall on web)
flow_results.FLOW8_FaceID: PASS - Correctly redirects to /paywall when no biometric hardware (expected on web)
flow_results.REGRESSION_step2: PASS - /onboarding/step2 shows 'Unmatched Route - Page could not be found'
flow_results.REGRESSION_profile_version: PASS - Profile screen shows '© 2026 Fixi App v1.3.0'

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 8 onboarding flows + 2 regression tests passing. App uses Expo React Native Web at https://fixi-onboarding-v13.preview.emergentagent.com. Use mobile viewport 390x844. testID props map to data-testid attributes in DOM. Face-ID screen redirects to /paywall on web (no biometric hardware). One minor bug: step6 canSubmit check missing monthly field validation.
